keywords.title: Keywords
keywords.description: List of search keywords. Each is searched separately and results combined.

location.title: Location
location.description: Location for the search. Use 'All Australia' for nationwide, or e.g. 'Sydney NSW'.

dateRange.title: Date Range (days)
dateRange.description: Only return jobs posted within this many days. Max 30.

maxResults.title: Max Results per keyword
maxResults.description: Maximum number of non-featured results to collect per keyword. Max 550.
